phrases.example: This line is moving slowly today.
I think they should open another counter.
Probably because it’s a busy time.

phrases.text: I get what you mean, but ...
phrases.example: I get what you mean, but staff might be limited.
To be honest, I don’t mind waiting a little.
That’s a good point—quality matters too.
What do you recommend from the menu?
I guess you’re right, it’s not that bad.
